display_text: Psychic Headband, Tier 3: Neutral item with Psychic Push ability that forcibly moves a target unit 400 distance away from you over 0.3 seconds. Single-target repositioning tool usable on both heroes and basic units. Does not trigger spell block or spell reflect. Stats: CD: 15s, Range: 0 (instant cast on target), Push Distance: 400, Push Duration: 0.3s.
